person.name: Paco Bernabe

After a long time working from home, because of the Covid pandemic, I have realized even more of the importance of meeting people face to face, and I have been attending more and more meetups since a few years ago. Last year (in 2024), I joined the team that organizes the Dutch Cloud Native Day and the Kubernetes Community Day in The Netherlands (I hope to see you at KCD Utrecht'25).

person.name: Paul Verhoeven

From setting up clusters to fine-tuning PostgreSQL and Kafka operators, I like being involved in every part of the stack.  Tech should make sense — and if it doesn’t, I’ll dig until it does (preferably with good coffee and a whiteboard nearby).

person.name: Santosh Gawande

person.name: Thomas Schuetz

His qualifications include an AWS Certified Solutions Architect, DevOps Engineer and an extensive array of Kubernetes credentials from CNCF (CKA, CKAD, CKS, KCNA, KCSA). Danilo leads significant cloud migration projects across Europe, working with public sector entities to harness cutting-edge cloud solutions.

person.name: Esra Siegert

person.name: Lili Wang

person.name: Piyush Gaur

person.name: Guy Menahem
